action.content:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)
action.label: context

action.content:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)

<<Resignation - [Your Name]>>

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this letter as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Your Last Day, e.g., two weeks from today].

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities I have had to grow and learn during my time here. I have truly enjoyed working with the team and appreciate the support you have provided me.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining time. Please let me know how I can best assist with handing over my responsibilities or training my replacement.

Thank you again for the opportunity to have been part of [Company Name]. I wish you and the company all the best in the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
action.label: response

combination:repeat_prompt.prompt_to_repeat: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
